message.content:
@startuml
package simpy as Simpy

class Component {
    label "Component"
    note "E"
    text "C1"
    text "C2"
    text "C3"
}

class Buffer {
    label "Buffer"
    note "C"
    text "id: int"
    text "accepts: Component"
    text "will_accept(): bool"
}

class Inspector {
    label "Inspector"
    note "C"
    text "id: int"
    text "env: environment"
    text "buffers: List[Buffer]"
    text "components: List[Component]"
    text "get_random_component(): Component"
    text "get_inspection_time(): int"
    text "inspect_component: Generator"
    text "add_component_to_buffer(): Generator"
    text "main_loop(): None"
}

class Workstation {
    label "Workstation"
    note "C"
    text "id: int"
    text "env: environment"
    text "buffers: List[Buffer]"
    text "get_assembly_time(): int"
    text "get_components(): Generator"
    text "assemble(): Generator"
    text "main_loop(): None"
}

class Container {
    label "container"
    note "C"
    text "capacity: Union[int, float]"
    text "init: Union[int, float]"
}

class Environment {
    label "environment"
    note "C"
}

Component --> Buffer
Buffer --> Inspector
Inspector --> Workstation
Inspector --> Container
Workstation --> Container
Container --> Environment

@enduml
